text:
Trying to create package results in:

Failed to build these modules:
nis                                                   


===>>> Creating a backup package for old version python27-2.7.2_3
tar: lib/python2.7/lib-dynload/nis.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
